# Representations {#part-representations .unnumbered}

This part turns raw text into vectors the model can compute with.
The goal is to make each row of the model's input matrix carry both identity and position.

- In @sec-ch03-tokens, you will see how text becomes token IDs, and how a small byte-pair encoding tokenizer works.
- In @sec-ch04-embeddings, token IDs become learned vectors through an embedding matrix.
- In @sec-ch05-positional-encoding, those vectors gain order so the model can distinguish "dog bites man" from "man bites dog."
